headline: 3 Reasons HSIC is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Henry Schein has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 17.3%. Its stock price has climbed to $75.99, representing a healthy 19.9% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
